title: taraxacum praterense
intro: Taraxacum praterense, also known as Alpine dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum praterense include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and provide antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum praterense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate various health conditions.
